UniversalManage Cloud

School, Coaching, Library, Restaurant aur business ERP - Supabase/Auth ready

पहले select करें: ye system kiske liye open karna hai?

Login/Google/Offline open karne se pehle sector choose karein. App ka dashboard, menu, labels, reports aur forms sector ke hisaab se change ho jayenge.

Universal mode ready.
DashboardLogin RolesFees/BillingAttendance/VisitsInventoryReports PDFWhatsApp

Supabase details डालकर connect करें।

Required Supabase setup:
1) Supabase SQL Editor me provided Supabase_SQL_Setup.sql run karein.
2) Authentication → Providers me Email enable rakhein. Google login ke liye Google provider enable karein.
3) Project URL aur Anon Public Key paste karke config save karein.
